nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator replacing human creativity

nodes.label_negative: AI-generated output used without human editing

nodes.label: Human control over final details and customization
nodes.grounding_span: I like having the freedom to comb through any small details and make customizations as I see fit

nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: it is important to show my own personal creativity rather than relying on the AI completely
